page.title: Category:Articles lacking in-text citations from August 2015

revision.comment: Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text: <!--templates--> {{wikidata link|Q20854161}} <!--interwikis--> [[en:Articles lacking in-text citations from 2015th year 8月]] [[en:Category:Articles lacking in-text citations from August 2015]] <!--categories--> [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]]

<!--templates--> {{wikidata link|Q20854161}} <!--interwikis--> [[en:Articles lacking in-text citations from 2015th year 8月]] [[en:Category:Articles lacking in-text citations from August 2015]] <!--categories--> [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]][[Category:maintainence categories]]

<!--templates--> {{wikidata link|Q20854161}} <!--interwikis--> [[en:Articles lacking in-text citations from 2015th year 8月]] [[en:Category:Articles lacking in-text citations from August 2015]] <!--categories--> [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]][[Category:maintainence categories]][[Category:maintainence categories]]
